title: Tune relevance ranking
description: Improve ranking by adjusting analysis, field boosts, and BM25/function scoring, measured each step against a judgment set.
body: Steps: 1. Build or extend a judgment set and baseline nDCG/precision@k. 2. Inspect why bad results rank high using the explain API (which terms/fields contributed). 3. Adjust one lever at a time: analysis (stemming/synonyms), field boosts (title over body), BM25 parameters, or function scoring (recency/popularity). 4. Re-evaluate on the judgment set after each change. 5. Keep only changes that improve the aggregate metric. Rollback point: revert the boost/parameter if the metric regresses. Validation: nDCG/precision improves across the judgment set and explain confirms the intended terms drive the score; tuning by single-query feel reliably regresses the rest.
